$comment: MIDDAG React UI — Schema Manifest. Entry point for AI agents and tooling to discover all available schemas.
name: @middag-io/react
description: Design system schemas for theme generation, block composition, and component usage.

schemas.title: Theme Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema defining the structure of a MIDDAG theme: tokens (colors, spacing, radius, shadows, typography, motion, layout, z-index), component overrides, and block overrides.
schemas.usage: Validate and generate theme JSON files. AI reads this to understand what can be customized.

schemas.title: Theme Defaults
schemas.description: All default token values for light and dark modes. Shows what a theme inherits when no override is specified. AI uses this as the baseline to diff against.
schemas.usage: Reference defaults when generating a theme. Only override tokens that differ from these values.

schemas.title: Block Types Schema
schemas.description: All block types with data shapes, layout region compatibility, and customization options. Used to compose PageContracts.
schemas.usage: AI reads this to generate valid PageContract JSON with correct block types and data structures.

schemas.title: Components Schema
schemas.description: All ReUI components with variants, sizes, and props. Used for themed UI composition.
schemas.usage: AI reads this to understand which components exist, their variants, and how to style them via theme overrides.

schemas.title: Navigation Contract
schemas.description: Sidebar navigation tree contract (NavigationNode, NavigationTreePayload, NavigationEntityType). Consumed by ProductShell.
schemas.usage: Understand the sidebar navigation structure when generating pages with navigation context.

schemas.title: Shared Props Contract
schemas.description: Inertia shared props (auth, theme, flash, scope, locale) sent on every request. Consumed by providers.
schemas.usage: Understand global data available on every page via usePage<SharedProps>().props.

schemas.title: Connectors Contract
schemas.description: Connector management types (ConnectorStatus, CredentialField, ConnectorDetail). Separate subsystem.
schemas.usage: Understand connector data shapes when building connector management pages.

schemas.title: AI Contract Manifest
schemas.description: Machine-readable manifest for LLMs and AI agents. Describes the full contract-driven rendering system with generation rules, validation, examples, and anti-patterns.
schemas.usage: Primary entry point for AI agents. Read this first to understand how to generate, validate, and adapt PageContracts.

themes.description: Default MIDDAG design language. Warm neutral base, dark blue-charcoal primary, generous radii, comfortable density.
Issue-tracker style. Cool corporate blue primary, tighter spacing, smaller radii, denser tables.
Warm, approachable. Rose/pink primary, larger radii, spacious density, warm cream surfaces.
Dark-first, high-contrast. Deep indigo primary, tight radii, compact density, dev-tools aesthetic.

theming.method: CSS custom properties scoped to a class
